overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway in Night City at night. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, massive digital billboards, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic on adjacent roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with palm trees overlooking traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated orange walkway, approaching the city center with neon-lit skyscrapers ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the walkway

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement screen on building facade displaying colorful graphics
tall palm tree lining the right side of the walkway
distinctive orange paved pedestrian path with textured surface
metal guardrail separating walkway from drop-off
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with neon signage in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a character walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway in a cyberpunk city at night. The path features distinctive orange paving and is lined with palm trees on the right and massive digital billboards on the left. The futuristic skyline glows with neon lights in the distance while moderate traffic flows on the road below.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with zebra crossing and heavy digital signage

events.description: walkway opens into a wide intersection with zebra crossing and multi-directional traffic
character steps onto crosswalk and crosses the street while vehicles pass on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and crossing the street amidst moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
tall illuminated advertising pillar displaying rotating digital content
tall pole with traffic signals and attached signage

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide intersection marked by a zebra crossing. The scene opens up with multiple lanes of traffic passing by and dense digital signage surrounding the crossing area. The character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass on the left, then continues onto the walkway on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with dense digital advertising and approaching transit structures

events.description: completing the street crossing and entering a denser commercial section with overhead displays

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past other pedestrians with corporate towers visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: woman with ponytail walking ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: series of suspended digital screens and signage spanning across the walkway ahead
distinctive mega-corporation high-rise with illuminated facade visible in the skyline
raised roadway or monorail track structure running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character continues along the elevated walkway into a denser commercial district. A prominent corporate tower dominates the distant skyline while overhead digital displays and elevated transit structures become prominent. The walkway remains orange-paved with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated urban walkway that transitions from a neon-lit promenade into a dense corporate district. It begins by following a character along an orange-paved path lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, with a glowing futuristic skyline visible in the distance. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a zebra crossing surrounded by dense digital signage and multiple lanes of flowing traffic. The camera then tracks the character across the street and back onto the walkway, where the environment shifts toward a more crowded commercial area. Finally, the view expands to show overhead transit structures and a prominent corporate tower dominating the skyline as the character moves deeper into the city.
